name: Jane Doe
title: Digital writing, forever
description: This is an example of a keystroke-logged writing process to illustrate the use of Keystroke Loxensis Light. The writing process was logged with Inputlog.

name: John Smith
title: Retyping Writing Life
description: This example has been created by retyping the first paragraphs of Annie Dillard's The Writing Life (1989), it is only intended to serve as an example of the visualisations.
